text:
Cons
• Clients with current drivers might prefer to experience increased latencies rather than
receiving non-retryable errors.
• Tuning the policy to only load shed during full overload (when the node becomes
unavailable) will ensure we provide a strictly better experience to
customers.Using the rate limiting signal to scale up the machine will help ensure
the customer does not see such errors for an extended period.
• Some clients will be forced to endure the problem until we release a new version for
each driver (which might wait until FY2027Q2 or Q3).
